title: SauceLand Modpack
description: The Mod Pack Used In SauceLand
body:
![Sauceland Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/832cb0c10a2073c3cc3a9d3fbc1e30bcc42e4f00.png)
This modpack, devoleped for the Sauceland Server is geared towards create users. offering only the highest quality of mods. the modpack contains many tools for creative builds, minigames, and shops!

Offers blocks from:
- [Arts & Crafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artsandcrafts)
- [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)
- [Dusty Decorations](https://modrinth.com/mod/dusty-decorations)

with new mechanics and adventures
- [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts)
- [Brewin' And Chewin'](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewin-and-chewin)
- [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [Create: Winery](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-winery)
- [Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide)

and many ways to make memories with friends:
- [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure), [Exposure: Polaroid](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure-polaroid)
- [Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat), [Audioplayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/audioplayer)
- [Music Maker Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-maker-mod)
